title: phaeocephalum album var. marcum
intro: Phaeocephalum album var. marcum is a type of plant also known as Phaeocephalum album, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaeocephalum album var. marcum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat malaria, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Phaeocephalum album var. marcum can be made into infusions, tinctures, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
